seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Nicole Holm - Marinda Kook

html:
Nicole Holm is everything I think an actor should be. She is focused and hugely talented. She chooses her roles carefully and tackles every role with care and professionalism. And she is the mother of a set of twins who are her heartbeat.

The cooking role, however, is one she approaches a little more carefully. I was in the privileged position of playing the role of director in the kitchen. She took direction and once again showed that no role is too challenging for her – not even that of chef!

Tune in on Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 to see her in action.
